description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a compact, tactical design, featuring a matte black finish and a robust polymer body. The rifle has a prominent integrated carrying handle and rail system on top, supporting a mounted optical scope for enhanced targeting. The magazine is housed behind the trigger assembly, characteristic of bullpup configurations, allowing for a shorter overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The stock is integrated into the rear section, providing a solid shoulder rest, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The barrel is long and slender, extending forward from the main body, and the fore-end has a textured grip area for stability. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with an integrated scope, polymer body, and ergonomic grip, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel and the alignment of the scope above the main body.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, the bullpup configuration, the mounted scope, and the textured foregrip.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock, the back of the scope, and the compactness of the bullpup design.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the magazine placement, scope, and ergonomic grip details.
